data.title: Musk's xAI offers investors better pricing for $5 billion debt offering
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Musk's artificial intelligence startup xAI Corp. has offered investors a more favorable pricing for its $5 billion debt offering, and Morgan Stanley also ended its commitment solicitation for the deal on the same day.
According to people familiar with the matter, the offering now includes:
$3 billion in bonds with a yield of 12.5%
$1 billion in fixed-rate term loans with an interest rate of 12.5%
$1 billion in Class B term loans, priced at the base rate plus 7.25 percentage points, issued at a discount of 96 cents on the dollar
Some investors had previously expected the company to increase its debt yield to complete the transaction. (TechinAsia)

data.title: Movement Network Foundation has completed the repurchase of 10 million MOVE
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the Movement Network Foundation announced that it has completed the repurchase of 10 million MOVE and announced the repurchase transaction address information, which is part of its repurchase commitment.

data.title: CoinMarketCap front-end got compromised with malicious code
data.description:
CoinMarketCap, the cryptocurrency market data platform with over 340 million monthly visits, faced a front-end compromise earlier today. The breach involved the injection of malicious JavaScript code into the site’s rotating “Doodles” feature, asking users to “verify wallet,” a pop-up meant to steal their funds. According to an on-chain analyst going by the pseudonym okHOTSHOT […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/coinmarketcap-front-end-compromised/

data.title: 5 Chainlink non-circulating supply addresses deposited 17.855 million LINK to Binance in the past 10 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to monitoring by on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, in the past 10 hours, a total of 5 Chainlink "non-circulating supply" addresses have recharged 17.855 million LINK to Binance, with a total value of US$224 million and an average recharge price of US$12.56.

data.title: Chairman of the National Financial and Development Laboratory: China needs to advance on two tracks in the face of the stable currency wave
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Li Yang, academician of the Chinese Academy of Social Sciences and chairman of the National Financial and Development Laboratory, said that the United States' promotion of stablecoin legislation is aimed at strengthening the status of the US dollar, promoting payment modernization, and creating new demand for US debt. Stablecoins are essentially an extension of the US dollar on the chain. Faced with the wave, China should firmly promote the internationalization of the RMB, follow the trend of integration of stablecoins and traditional finance, and promote the complementary development of RMB stablecoins and central bank digital currencies. Li Yang suggested making full use of Hong Kong's advantages, developing offshore RMB stablecoins, and building controllable international payment channels. (National Financial and Development Laboratory)

data.title: Wyoming, the United States, launches a public chain bidding for stablecoin issuance and publicizes the review process
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Wyoming, the U.S. state that plans to issue a state-level stablecoin, has officially entered the bidding stage. It is reported that the state has launched a website to publicize all review processes to ultimately select which public chain the stablecoin will be issued on. Wyoming lists 9 dimensions including the number of users, stability, performance and other indicators for scoring and evaluation. A total of 17 public chains were shortlisted and evaluated in two batches. Currently, Solana and Aptos are tied for first place with 32 points, and Sei is 30 points.

data.title: Wyoming Advances in State-Level Stablecoin Issuance Process
data.description: According to Odaily, Wyoming has officially entered the bidding phase for issuing a state-level stablecoin. The state has launched a website to publicly display all review processes, aiming to select the blockchain on which the stablecoin will be issued. Wyoming has outlined nine criteria, including user numbers, stability, and performance, to score and evaluate the candidates. A total of 17 blockchains have been shortlisted, and the evaluation is being conducted in two batches. Currently, Solana and Aptos are tied for first place with 32 points, while Sei follows with 30 points.

data.title: Chainlink non-circulating supply address deposited 3 million LINK to Binance 7 hours ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, Chainlink's Non-Circulating Supply address recharged 3 million LINK to Binance 7 hours ago, with a value of up to 37.53 million US dollars. The last time this address recharged a large amount of $LINK to the exchange was three months ago.

data.title: Opinion: If Ethereum is regarded as the "new America", Uniswap is equivalent to the New York Stock Exchange, and Polymarket is like the New York Times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News 1confirmation founder Nick Tomaino posted on the X platform that if Ethereum is regarded as the "new America", then the builders of the Ethereum ecosystem are the "founding fathers", Uniswap is equivalent to the New York Stock Exchange, Aave is equivalent to Bank of America, Polymarket is equivalent to the New York Times, Opensea and NFT project parties are equivalent to Disney, SuperRare is equivalent to MoMa, and Nexus Mutual is equivalent to State Farm.

data.title: Publicly traded Davis Commodities launches agricultural tokenization platform and digital asset treasury strategy
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Nasdaq-listed Singaporean company Davis Commodities announced the launch of a digital asset treasury strategy and a blockchain-driven agricultural tokenization platform to convert major physical commodities such as sugar, rice and cooking oil into tokenized, tradable digital assets. The platform is based on smart contract settlement and supports on-chain supply chain tracking, as well as tokenized collateral, allowing institutional lenders to pledge tokenized commodities.
Davis Commodities previously announced a $30 million strategic growth plan, 40% of which will be invested in Bitcoin reserves to include it in the balance sheet as a strategic financial asset. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Ethereum Ecosystem Compared to American Institutions
data.description: According to Odaily, Nick Tomaino, founder of 1confirmation, shared his perspective on the X platform, likening Ethereum to a 'new America.' He described the builders of the Ethereum ecosystem as 'founding fathers.' In his analogy, Uniswap is compared to the New York Stock Exchange, Aave to Bank of America, and Polymarket to The New York Times. Additionally, Opensea and NFT project teams are likened to Disney, SuperRare to the Museum of Modern Art (MoMA), and Nexus Mutual to State Farm.

data.title: CoinMarketCap phishing Popup neutralized in swift security response
data.description:
21-6-2025 – CoinMarketCap, the prominent cryptocurrency price-tracking platform, has eradicated malicious code from its website, according to a statement shared on its official X account. The offending code, which triggered a deceptive popup urging users to “verify” their crypto wallets, was neutralised, though the company stressed that its probe into the breach remains active. “Our [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/coinmarketcap-phishing-popup-neutralized-in-swift-security-response/

data.title: An OTC scam involving cryptocurrencies such as NEAR and SEI was exposed, with the amount of fraud exceeding US$50 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: An over-the-counter (OTC) scam involving multiple cryptocurrencies such as SUI, NEAR, Axelar, SEI, etc. was exposed, with a fraud amount of more than 50 million US dollars, affecting venture capitalists, opinion leaders and large investors. The scam was operated through a Telegram group and lasted for several months. In the early stage, trust was established by fulfilling promises, and then it turned into a Ponzi scheme and eventually collapsed. The leading party Aza Ventures said that its core trader "Source 1" was the founder of a Binance online project and may be of Indian nationality. (Pluid)

data.title: A crypto KOL-related wallet bought 3.39 million KTA at an average price of $0.635
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a wallet associated with a certain crypto KOL (@general6316) spent 2.156 million USDT to purchase 3.39 million KTA at a price of 0.635.
